description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named pymnn_release that triggers on push to .github/workflows/pymnn_release.yml with any tag and on workflow dispatch. The workflow has two jobs: build_wheels and publish_wheels. The build_wheels job runs on multiple platforms (ubuntu-latest, ubuntu-24.04-arm, windows-latest, macos-13, macos-14) with different architectures and Python builds. It checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.12, and uses cibuildwheel to build wheels for each platform. The publish_wheels job uploads the built wheels to PyPI.
